title: Ahtna Traditional First Chief Fred Ewan Passes Away at 103
summary: Funeral Service Information There will be an outdoor service at Glennallen High School on Monday, April 20th at 1:00 pm. Attendees must stay in their cars and comply with COVID-19 mandates while on school property. Burial to follow at Gulkana Cemetery. When health mandates are lifted we hope to honor our Chief in our traditional way. The service will also be live streamed beginning at 1:00 pm (AKDT): https://livestream.com/accounts/187087/events/9095964. FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ??????????????????????????????? title: 47th Annual Meeting Rescheduled to September 12, 2020
summary: The Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) Board of Directors has rescheduled the 47 th Annual Meeting from June 6, 2020, to September 12, 2020 due to the global COVID-19 pandemic.
